subcodes.first_line: O distinguished branch of the Blessed Tree! In truth, thou art not merely a deputy on behalf of this servant, but art indeed a principal [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع البدیع من السدره المبارکه آن حضرت از قبل این عبد وکیل بلکه اصیل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for governments and rulers, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice
